shared_rules: Runtime: Bun-only (preference). Exception: packages/bxc-extension for MCP SDK compatibility.
Autonomy: Extreme YOLO Mode enabled. 100% autonomous, zero confirmation for commands/deployments.
Deep Think: Mandatory use of 'mcp_sequentialthinking' for complex tasks (>3 tools) or refactoring.
Security: .env files are strictly read-only for users, blocked for agents. Use .env.example for templates.
FFI Architecture: Async-first via thread pool. Avoid blocking the main event loop.
Tooling: Oxlint for linting, Biome for formatting. No Prettier/ESLint except in vendored sources.
Vendoring: MCP SDK is now local at vendor/mcp-sdk-typescript. Avoid external npm @modelcontextprotocol/sdk updates.

collaboration_protocol.state_sync: Check MEMORY.md and MEGA-PLAN.md before major refactors.
collaboration_protocol.resource_ownership: Gemini handles low-level FFI and Windows build; Claude handles Scraping recipes and UI.
collaboration_protocol.conflict_resolution: Project-local GEMINI.md/CLAUDE.md takes precedence over global settings.
collaboration_protocol.handover: Record significant architectural milestones in MEGA-PLAN.md.

active_context.last_major_change: FFI curl-impersonate integration, recursive crawler options, HAR logging (May 31, 2026)
active_context.status: Healthy (Unit tests green, FFI mirror verified)
